description: CompositionBlue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, has three quarter sleeves with gathers on the top and a broad band at the cuffs, and graphic print on the front with bead embellishmentsFitRegularWash careMachine wash cold inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsDesigned for those who enjoy folklore, this t-shirt from wrangler makes a great casual wear. The gathered sleeves enhances your feminine side, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with slim fit jeans or cotton shorts and sandals and win in style.Model statisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
